Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class HealthRecord

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.HealthRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HealthRecord extends Object implements Serializable
HealthRecord contains all the coded entries in a person's health record. This class represents a logical health record. Exporters will convert this health record into various standardized formats.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HealthRecord.Allergy
    Allergy represents an allergy or intolerance that a person has.
    class 
    HealthRecord.CarePlan
    CarePlan is a plan for care that may include multiple activities and goals.
    static class 
    HealthRecord.Code
    HealthRecord.Code represents a system, code, and display value.
    class 
    HealthRecord.Device
    Device is an implantable device such as a coronary stent, artificial knee or hip, heart pacemaker, or implantable defibrillator.
    class 
    HealthRecord.Encounter
    Represents a single encounter in a person's health record.
    static enum 
    HealthRecord.EncounterType
    EncounterType represents the type of an encounter.
    class 
    HealthRecord.Entry
    All things within a HealthRecord are instances of Entry.
    class 
    HealthRecord.EntryWithReasons
    An Entry with a list of reason codes
    class 
    HealthRecord.ImagingStudy
    ImagingStudy represents a collection of images
    class 
    HealthRecord.Immunization
    Represents an immunization entry in a patient's health record.
    class 
    HealthRecord.Medication
    Medication is a prescription or administration of a medication.
    class 
    HealthRecord.Observation
    An Observation for the patient record
    class 
    HealthRecord.Procedure
    Represents a procedure performed on a patient.
    static enum 
    HealthRecord.ReactionSeverity
    Enum of snomed codes to use for Allergy resource
    class 
    HealthRecord.Report
    Report is a collection of observations that are grouped together
    class 
    HealthRecord.Supply
    Supply resource

    End an existing allergy with the supplied state if one exists.

    Get the current care plan of the specified type or create a new one if none found.

    End an existing condition if one exists.

  • Constructor Details

    • HealthRecord

      public HealthRecord(Person person)
      Construct a health record for the supplied person.
      Parameters:
      person - the person.

  • Method Details

    • providerCount

      public int providerCount()
      Returns the number of providers associated with this healthrecord.
      Returns:
      the number of unique providers.

    • textSummary

      public String textSummary()
      Create a text summary of the health record containing counts of each time of entry.
      Returns:
      text summary.

    • currentEncounter

      public HealthRecord.Encounter currentEncounter(long time)
      Get the latest encounter or, if none exists, create a new wellness encounter.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the encounter if a new one is created.
      Returns:
      the latest encounter (possibly newly created).

    • timeSinceLastWellnessEncounter

      public long timeSinceLastWellnessEncounter(long time)
      Return the time between the supplied time and the time of the last wellness encounter. If there are no wellness encounter return Long.MAX_VALUE.
      Parameters:
      time - the time to measure from
      Returns:
      the time difference, negative if time is before the first wellness encounter).

    • lastWellnessEncounter

      public HealthRecord.Encounter lastWellnessEncounter()
      Return the last wellness encounter for the individual.
      Returns:
      the Encounter or null if it does not exist

    • observation

      public HealthRecord.Observation observation(long time, String type, Object value)
      Add an observation with the supplied properties to the current encounter.
      Parameters:
      time - time of the observation.
      type - type of the observation.
      value - value of the observation.
      Returns:
      the new observation.

    • multiObservation

      public HealthRecord.Observation multiObservation(long time, String type, int numberOfObservations)
      Add a new observation for the specified time and type, move the specified number of observations (in reverse order) from the encounter to sub observations of the new observation. If the encounter does not have the specified number of observations then none are moved and a new empty observation results.
      Parameters:
      time - time of the new observation.
      type - type of the new observation.
      numberOfObservations - the number of observations to move from the encounter to the new observation.
      Returns:
      the new observation.

    • getLatestObservation

      public HealthRecord.Observation getLatestObservation(String type)
      Get the latest observation of the specified type or null if none exists.
      Parameters:
      type - the type of observation.
      Returns:
      the latest observation or null if none exists.

    • conditionStart

      public HealthRecord.Entry conditionStart(long time, String primaryCode)
      Return an existing Entry for the specified code or create a new Entry if none exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the new entry if one is created.
      primaryCode - the type of the entry.
      Returns:
      the entry (existing or new).

    • conditionEnd

      public void conditionEnd(long time, String primaryCode)
      End an existing condition if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the condition.
      primaryCode - the type of the condition to search for.

    • conditionEndByState

      public void conditionEndByState(long time, String stateName)
      End an existing condition with the supplied state if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the condition.
      stateName - the state to search for.

    • conditionActive

      public boolean conditionActive(String type)
      Check whether the specified condition type is currently active (end is not specified).
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the condition.
      Returns:
      true of the condition exists and does not have a specified stop time, false otherwise.

    • presentOnset

      public Long presentOnset(String code)
      Get the onset time for any entry that is currently present in the healthrecord.
      Parameters:
      code - The clinical code for the entry.
      Returns:
      The onset time or null if not present.

    • allergyStart

      public HealthRecord.Allergy allergyStart(long time, String primaryCode)
      Return the current allergy of the specified type or create a new one if none exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the start time of the new allergy if one is created.
      primaryCode - the type of allergy.
      Returns:
      the existing or new allergy entry.

    • allergyEnd

      public void allergyEnd(long time, String primaryCode)
      End the current allergy of the specified type if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - end time of the allergy.
      primaryCode - type of the allergy.

    • allergyEndByState

      public void allergyEndByState(long time, String stateName)
      End an existing allergy with the supplied state if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the allergy.
      stateName - the state to search for.

    • allergyActive

      public boolean allergyActive(String type)
      Checks whether the specified allergy is active. Note that this functionality already exited in the conditionActive method, but adding this method makes the intention of the caller more clear. This is method simply calls conditionActive and returns the result.
      Parameters:
      type - The type of allergy to look for
      Returns:
      true if there is an active allergy for the type

    • procedure

      public HealthRecord.Procedure procedure(long time, String type)
      Create a new procedure of the specified type.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the procedure.
      type - the type of the procedure.
      Returns:
      the new procedure.

    • deviceImplant

      public HealthRecord.Device deviceImplant(long time, String type)
      Implant or assign a device to this patient.
      Parameters:
      time - The time the device is implanted or assigned.
      type - The type of device.
      Returns:
      The device entry.

    • deviceRemove

      public void deviceRemove(long time, String type)
      Remove a device from the patient.
      Parameters:
      time - The time the device is removed.
      type - The type of device.

    • deviceRemoveByState

      public void deviceRemoveByState(long time, String stateName)
      Remove a device from the patient based on the state where it was assigned.
      Parameters:
      time - The time the device is removed.
      stateName - The state where the device was implanted or assigned.

    • useSupply

      public HealthRecord.Supply useSupply(long time, HealthRecord.Code code, int quantity)
      Track the use of a supply in the provision of care for this patient.
      Parameters:
      time - Time the supply was used
      code - SNOMED Code to identify the supply
      quantity - Number of this supply used
      Returns:
      the new Supply entry

    • report

      public HealthRecord.Report report(long time, String type, int numberOfObservations)
      Add a new report for the specified time and type, copy the specified number of observations (in reverse order) from the encounter to the new report. If the encounter does not have the specified number of observations then all of the encounter observations are copied to the report.
      Parameters:
      time - time of the new report.
      type - type of the new report.
      numberOfObservations - the number of observations to copy from the encounter to the new report.
      Returns:
      the new report.

    • encounterStart

      public HealthRecord.Encounter encounterStart(long time, HealthRecord.EncounterType type)
      Starts an encounter of the given type at the given time.
      Parameters:
      time - the start time of the encounter.
      type - the type of the encounter.
      Returns:
      the newly created encounter.

    • encounterEnd

      public void encounterEnd(long time, HealthRecord.EncounterType type)
      Ends an encounter.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the encounter.
      type - the type of the encounter.

    • lastEncounterTime

      public long lastEncounterTime()
      Gets the time of the most recent encounter in this health record.
      Returns:
      the time of the most recent encounter

    • immunization

      public HealthRecord.Immunization immunization(long time, String type)
      Create a new immunization and add it to the current encounter.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the immunization.
      type - the type of the immunization.
      Returns:
      the new immunization.

    • medicationStart

      public HealthRecord.Medication medicationStart(long time, String type, boolean chronic)
      Get an existing medication of the specified type or create one if none exists. If chronic is true the medication will be added to the list of chronic medications whether it already exists or is created.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the medication if a new one is created.
      type - the type of the medication to find or create.
      chronic - whether the medication is chronic.
      Returns:
      existing or new medication of the specified type.

    • medicationAdministration

      public HealthRecord.Medication medicationAdministration(long time, String type)
      Administer a medication without altering existing medications.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the administration.
      type - the type of the medication to administer.
      Returns:
      new medication of the specified type.

    • medicationEnd

      public void medicationEnd(long time, String type, HealthRecord.Code reason)
      End a current medication of the specified type if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the medication.
      type - the type of the medication.
      reason - the reason for ending the medication.

    • medicationEndByState

      public void medicationEndByState(long time, String stateName, HealthRecord.Code reason)
      End an existing medication with the supplied state if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the medication.
      stateName - the state to search for.
      reason - the reason for ending the medication.

    • medicationActive

      public boolean medicationActive(String type)
      Returns whether the specified medication is active
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the medication to check
      Returns:
      true if the medication exists and does not have a specified stop time, false otherwise

    • careplanStart

      public HealthRecord.CarePlan careplanStart(long time, String type)
      Get the current care plan of the specified type or create a new one if none found.
      Parameters:
      time - the start time of the care plan if one is created.
      type - the type of the care plan.
      Returns:
      existing or new care plan.

    • careplanEnd

      public void careplanEnd(long time, String type, HealthRecord.Code reason)
      End the current care plan of the specified type if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the care plan.
      type - the type of the care plan.
      reason - the reason for ending the care plan.

    • careplanEndByState

      public void careplanEndByState(long time, String stateName, HealthRecord.Code reason)
      End an existing care plan with the supplied state if one exists.
      Parameters:
      time - the end time of the care plan.
      stateName - the state to search for.
      reason - the reason for ending the care plan.

    • careplanActive

      public boolean careplanActive(String type)
      Returns whether the careplan is currently active
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the care plan to check
      Returns:
      true if the care plan exists and does not have a specified stop time, false otherwise

    • imagingStudy

      public HealthRecord.ImagingStudy imagingStudy(long time, String type, List<HealthRecord.ImagingStudy.Series> series)
      Create a new imaging study.
      Parameters:
      time - the time of the study.
      type - the type of the study.
      series - the series associated with the study.
      Returns:
      the new imaging study.
